scope.diff_summary: Added a large-file report and gate for duplicate manifest keys, stale growth, shrink warnings, missing manifest entries, missing files, missing governance fields, and planned_refactor growth without split plans; wired the gate into package scripts and affected-test fail-open behavior; refreshed one reduced manifest line count and marked LFG-P1 pass after DeepSeek delta review.
gates_reviewed: Duplicate JSON keys are detected before JSON.parse last-key-wins behavior can hide them.
Files that grow beyond manifest line counts fail the gate; files that shrink produce warnings and do not block pass.
Planned-refactor file growth without a split plan or growth justification fails the gate.
Tracked files over the threshold must be present in .largefile-manifest.json.
Manifest entries must point to real files and include reason and status.
check:large-files exits non-zero on issues and can be used as the LFG-P1 gate.
Large-file governance files are included in affected-test fail-open behavior.

notes: DeepSeek initial review found blocking issues around shrink hard-fail behavior and missing-entry coverage. The implementation was updated, local gates reran, and final DeepSeek delta review returned PASS with no blocking or non-blocking findings.
